tree.name: Bronny James
tree.tradeDescription: 4-team trade: Clippers traded a 2024 2nd (LAC own, #55, Bronny James) and a 2025 2nd to Lakers; Nuggets traded Bones Hyland to Clippers and Davon Reed to Lakers; Lakers traded Thomas Bryant to Nuggets, Patrick Beverley and cash to Magic; Magic traded Mo Bamba to Lakers; Nuggets traded a 2024 2nd to Magic
tree.note: USC guard, #55 pick (2024); historic father-son duo with LeBron. Pick acquired from LAC in 4-team trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: Thomas Bryant
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed as FA Jul 6, 2022; sent to DEN in 4-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Patrick Beverley
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Lakers traded Talen Horton-Tucker and Stanley Johnson to Jazz for Patrick Beverley

assetsGivenUp.name: Talen Horton-Tucker
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Lakers traded cash ($2.2M) and a 2020 2nd round pick (#58, Paul Reed) to Magic for the #46 pick (Talen Horton-Tucker)
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted #46 by ORL, immediately traded to LAL on draft night

assetsGivenUp.name: 2020 2nd Round Pick (#58)
assetsGivenUp.note: LAL own pick; sent to ORL in THT trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Stanley Johnson
assetsGivenUp.note: Shared cost — also appears in Luka Doncic tree. Signed full contract Jan 27, 2022; sent to UTA in Beverley trade
